title: How to Get Rich with AI (The Real Formula)
summary: The video presents a framework for using AI strategically in business rather than as a novelty tool. The core concept is identifying the single biggest bottleneck in your business chain which covers attention, leads, sales, delivery, and retention, then pointing AI directly at that constraint. The presenter shares real examples from his portfolio companies showing how AI automates prospecting, qualifying, pitching, follow-up, and upsells. The message is clear that AI should be doing revenue-generating work around the clock, not just producing outputs that feel impressive but do not make money.
key_takeaways: Stop using AI as a toy. Assign it to real revenue-generating tasks like lead generation, follow-up sequences, and customer qualification.
Every business has a chain: attention, leads, sales, delivery, retention. Find the one stage that is choking revenue and attack it first with AI.
The 10x test: ask at each stage whether 10x-ing that stage would increase revenue or just create a new bottleneck. This identifies your true constraint.
AI handles the full sales sequence including prospecting, qualifying, personalized pitching, follow-up, and upsells so humans only need to show up and close.
Upsells are seven times easier than new customer acquisition. Use AI to monitor usage, renewals, and behavior triggers to send personalized upsell messages automatically.
pitch_angles: The Bottleneck Audit Angle: Ask the prospect where they lose the most time or money in their customer journey. Frame your automation system as the surgical fix for that one broken stage, not a general tech upgrade.

The 24/7 Closer Angle: Position your AI voice agent or CRM automation as a sales rep that never sleeps, never feels rejection, and follows up every single lead without burning out. Contrast this with what their team currently drops.

The Revenue Leak Angle: Open with the question of how many leads they are currently not following up with. Most local businesses have hundreds of cold leads sitting in a spreadsheet. Show them how GHE automation captures that lost revenue immediately.
sales_scripts: Right now you have leads coming in but your team cannot keep up with follow-up, and every unanswered lead is money walking out the door. Our AI system qualifies, follows up, and books appointments automatically so your team only talks to people ready to buy. We have clients recovering thousands in lost revenue within the first 30 days.

Most local businesses are great at their craft but terrible at the sales process because it is manual, repetitive, and exhausting. We build an AI system that handles your entire lead-to-appointment pipeline without adding headcount. You focus on closing and delivering, the AI handles everything before and after the call.

objection_handlers.objection: I already have a CRM and it is not really working for us.
objection_handlers.response: That is exactly the problem. A CRM stores contacts but does not do anything with them. Our system activates those contacts with automated follow-up, AI qualification calls, and personalized outreach so your existing leads actually convert instead of going cold.

objection_handlers.objection: I am not sure AI can handle our type of customer or our specific process.
objection_handlers.response: We do not deploy generic automation. We map your exact intake process, your qualifying questions, and your customer language before building anything. The system is trained on your business so it sounds like your best team member, not a robot.

objection_handlers.objection: This sounds expensive and I do not have the budget right now.
objection_handlers.response: Let me ask you this: how much is one closed job worth to your business, and how many leads did you not follow up with last month? Our retainer typically pays for itself inside the first two to three closed deals. The cost of not having this system is almost always higher than the cost of building it.

revenue_application: To hit $100K within two months, GHE should apply the bottleneck framework to its own sales process first. The priority stack is: land three to five managed retainer clients at $750 per month as the recurring base, close ten to fifteen AI automation setup projects at a one-time project fee of $3,000 to $5,000 per client, and layer in TradingView indicator and signal sales through content and email sequences running on autopilot. Use the video framework to run a bottleneck audit on each prospect during the discovery call to immediately demonstrate value and justify the retainer. The fastest path to $100K is combining three retainer clients plus eight to ten project closes in month one, then converting those project clients into retainer clients in month two while signals and indicators compound passively.
action_items: Build a one-page bottleneck audit script for discovery calls that walks local business prospects through the five-stage chain and identifies where their revenue is leaking. Use this in every first conversation to anchor the value of automation before quoting price.

Create a short video or case study showing a before and after of a local business using GHE automation to recover lost leads and increase booked appointments. Post it as organic content and use it as a sales asset in DMs and email outreach.

Set up an AI-powered outreach sequence targeting HVAC, plumbing, roofing, and HOA management companies using a prospecting tool. The sequence should open with the revenue leak question, qualify interest automatically, and book a discovery call without manual follow-up.
twitter_posts: Most local businesses have 100+ cold leads sitting untouched. That is not a lead problem. That is a follow-up problem. AI fixes it overnight.
Your CRM is a graveyard if nothing is following up automatically. AI does not forget, does not ghost, does not get tired. Build the system.
Stop asking if AI is ready for your business. Ask how much money you lost last month because a human forgot to follow up. That is your answer.
linkedin_posts:
Most business owners think they have a lead problem. They actually have a follow-up problem.

I talk to local service businesses every week who have hundreds of contacts sitting cold in a spreadsheet or CRM nobody is touching. Roofing companies, HVAC contractors, HOA managers. Same story everywhere.

The leads came in. Someone got busy. The follow-up never happened. The job went to whoever called back first.

AI does not get busy. It does not forget. It does not feel awkward sending a fifth follow-up message.

If you are running a local service business and you are not automating your follow-up sequence, you are leaving serious money on the table every single month. That stops being optional the moment your competitor figures it out.

The smartest thing I took from a recent video on AI and business growth was the 10x test.

At every stage of your customer journey, ask yourself: if I 10x this stage tomorrow, does my revenue go up or do I just create a new bottleneck somewhere else?

Most businesses 10x their ad spend and wonder why revenue does not move. The bottleneck was never traffic. It was the follow-up, the qualification call, the intake process nobody was managing.

This is exactly why we build automation systems before recommending more marketing spend to any client.

Fix the leak first. Then pour more water in.

If you want to run a bottleneck audit on your business or your client pipeline, reach out. It takes about 20 minutes and most people walk away seeing exactly where their revenue is going.
